style_effects: Gentle streams of shimmering blue water droplets cling to Arbok's scales, drifting upward in slow, hypnotic spirals. A soft, ethereal blue-white luminescence pulses from its pores, casting ripples of light across the surrounding water, while submerged bubbles rise in delicate, translucent clusters. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
